articles.title: Connelly Early once again gave losing Red Sox a chance to win, but failed to pitch deeper into the game
articles.description:
Early has allowed lots of traffic on the bases, but has found his way out of several jams through three starts.

The post Connelly Early once again gave losing Red Sox a chance to win, but failed to pitch deeper into the game appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Connelly Early struggled again, failing to pitch beyond the fifth inning in his third start.
He allowed numerous baserunners but managed to escape multiple jams during the game.
Red Sox continue to face challenges, impacting their chances of winning crucial games this season.

articles.title: It’s been decades since a center won the NBA Most Improved Player award. Will Neemias Queta be next?
articles.description:
"He should seriously be considered because of where he was and where he is now," Joe Mazzulla said.

The post It’s been decades since a center won the NBA Most Improved Player award. Will Neemias Queta be next? appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Joe Mazzulla advocates for Neemias Queta's candidacy for NBA Most Improved Player award.
Queta's performance has significantly improved, making him a strong contender this season.
A win could inspire local youth and boost interest in Boston basketball.

articles.title: The Red Sox need to shake up the top of their lineup to avoid slow starts
articles.description:
Instead of getting on Dustin May early, Boston gave him his best start of the season.

The post The Red Sox need to shake up the top of their lineup to avoid slow starts appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Red Sox struggled against pitcher Dustin May, allowing him his best start this season.
Team's slow starts continue to hinder performance, impacting fan engagement and attendance.
Management may consider lineup changes to improve early game results and boost morale.
